quests.title: Word on the Street
quests.hook: "Go rattle Static Rin's cage at the Noodle Bar, see what she's picked up. Then come tell me."

steps.description: Talk to Static Rin at the Chrome Noodle Bar.

quests.complete_text: "Good. Knowing things before everyone else — that's half the job."

quests.title: Chrome Debt
quests.hook: "Ganger crew's been shaking down my clients. Handle one of them in the Undercity, then report back."

steps.description: Take down a Street Ganger in the Undercity.

quests.complete_text: "One down. Credits are yours — spend 'em quiet."

quests.title: Drone Bounty
quests.hook: "Corp's lost control of a delivery drone. Scrap it in the Undercity before it wanders into the wrong feed. Report back after."

steps.description: Scrap the Rogue Drone in the Undercity.

quests.complete_text: "Nice and quiet. That's how the corp likes it. Here's your cut."

quests.title: Corp Trouble
quests.hook: "A corp patrol's been leaning on my Undercity contacts. Put one down, then get back here."

steps.description: Take down a Corp Patrol Trooper in the Undercity.

quests.complete_text: "That'll rattle them for a while. Nice work."
